description: Cambase.io was a project by Evercam.io that provided camera hardware model information through an API. The current `cambase.io` website no longer appears to host that developer product, but historical API documentation remains available via its published Swagger/OpenAPI description.
summary: Cambase.io exposes one documented HTTP API surface: the Cambase.io REST API at `http://api.cambase.io`, with a public OpenAPI/Swagger document mirrored by APIs.guru; authentication requirements could not be reliably determined from current public docs.
